# Common Installation Pitfalls and Prevention Strategies: Lessons from 100+ Biosafety Projects

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
生物安全设备的安装调试存在大量常见问题，这些"坑"往往是项目经理背锅的原因。本角度总结实际项目中的常见问题与规避策略，帮助项目经理提前预防。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Documented installation failure patterns—incorrect mounting substrate, insufficient clearances, inadequate site preparation—exist because project managers don't learn from peer experiences until it's too late.

## 参考素材
- Mounting substrate issues: wall structure must support ≥150KG door weight, reinforcement requirements
- Clearance requirements: door swing radius, maintenance access space (≥600mm), forklift transport path
- Electrical planning: dedicated circuits required, wire gauge specifications, conduit routing
- Integration challenges: BMS connection requires提前network infrastructure, SCADA integration timeline
- Site preparation timing: HVAC must be operational before pressure testing, temperature/humidity conditions
- Change order prevention: detailed specification review before procurement, site survey before installation

## 关键词
Installation Pitfalls, Project Planning, Site Preparation, Risk Prevention, Change Orders, Lessons Learned, Best Practices
